hadith_entries.text:
876. Narrated Abu-Huraira; 'Allah's Messenger said:
"All Muslims are brothers. A muslim does not wrong his
fellow-Muslim, desert him, nor despise him. Piety is found
here - (pointing three times to his chest - despising one's
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
Muslim brother is enough evil for any man to do. Every
Muslim's blood, property and honor are unlawful to be
violated by another Muslim." (At-Termizi).

877. Narrated Wa'ila ibn Al-Asqa'a; 'The Messenger of
Allah said: "Do not show schadenfreude at your brother's
(misfortune) lest Allah should release him and inflict you."
